description: R.A. Chandani Ranasinghe Vs. Prasanna Sanjeewa and 3 Others before Hon.K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: R.A. Chandani Ranasinghe Vs. Prasanna Sanjeewa and 3 Others
keywords: Revision application arising out an order made by a Provincial High Court established under Article 154P(1) of the Constitution in the exercise of Writ Jurisdiction vested in it by Article 154P(4)(b) of the Constitution- The legal effect of the suppression of material facts relevant to the determination of an application for a writ of certiorari.
legistation: Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Article 138
